subtopics.title: Revision for BECE Business Studies
common_misconceptions: Bookkeeping is only for big businesses
You don't need records for small transactions
subtopics.teaching_note: BECE Business Studies: Double entry system (debit and credit), Cash book (recording cash transactions), Source documents (receipt, invoice, debit note, credit note), Office equipment (computer, photocopier, stapler), Types of trade (retail, wholesale, import, export), Consumer rights (right to safety, information, choice, redress), Saving and investment. Practical skills: filling forms, writing receipts, basic calculations.
